Off Calendar Aug-16-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: CROSS-DEFENDANT MINAKO TOGASHI'S MOTION TO STRIKE SLAPP.
APPEARANCES: HOLLY SCHAITBERGER (BLEDSOE CATHCART, ET AL., 415.981.5411) APPEARING FOR CROSS-DEFENDANT MINAKO TOGASHI. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE STATEMENTS BY MS. TOGASHI INVOLVED A MATTER OF PUBLIC CONCERN AND ARE PROTECTED ACTIVITY. WILBANKS V WOLK (2004) 121 CAL APP 4TH 883, 894; PARADISE HILLS ASSOC. V PROCEL (1991) 235 CAL APP 3RD 1528. THE STATEMENTS MADE WERE RELATED TO HER PENDING LAWSUIT AND ARE PRIVILEGED. C.C. SECTION 47(B). AS A CONSEQUENCE, ELI CANNOT PREVAIL ON HER CLAIMS. ROHDE V WOLF (AUGUST 15, 2007) 07 C.D.O.S. 9583. TOGASHI'S COUNSEL MUST SUBMIT A DETAILED DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF THE REQUEST FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (302/PJM/AP) JUDGE: PATRICK J.
